title: Prion-like Proteins
script_summary: Unraveling the science behind prion-like proteins and their surprising roles.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about prion-like proteins than social media does.
Prion-like proteins are misfolded proteins that can induce other proteins to misfold, leading to diseases.
These proteins aren't just bad news—some may play roles in healthy brain function and memory.
Research shows prion-like behavior in various cellular processes, hinting at a complex relationship.
Understanding them could unlock new therapies for neurodegenerative diseases.
Curious about more science stories? Hit that follow for more mind-bending insights!
